cards.name: Iron Knight
cards.description: Sworn to a king long dead, still bound by an oath that outlasted kingdoms.

cards.name: Crystal Mage
cards.description: Her mind is a lattice of pure logic. Her heart, a shard of absolute cold.

cards.name: Sea Witch
cards.description: Commands the tides and the things that lurk beneath them. Neither serves willingly.

cards.name: Storm Giant
cards.description: His might is as terrible as his wit is sharp. He laughs loudest in the lightning.

cards.name: Arcane Fox
cards.description: Seven tails, seven hexes. Count carefully — some folk forget to count at all.

cards.name: Lava Titan
cards.description: Born where the ocean meets the volcano. Has never needed to raise his voice.

cards.name: Frost Queen
cards.description: Her mercy is as rare as summer in the north. She rules because none dare oppose her.

cards.name: Celestial Dragon
cards.description: Swims through the void between suns as a fish swims through water. Unconcerned.

cards.name: Ancient Leviathan
cards.description: Older than the ocean floor it rests upon. The sea is merely its bedroom.

cards.name: God of Storms
cards.description: Does not command the storm. Is the storm, given form and terrible purpose.
